name: Calamity
loreText: Set the world ablaze and burn along with it.

name: Fractured Crown
loreText: Few goals have cost more lives than the quest for power.

name: Snowblind
loreText: Blind with the snow, never blinded by it.

name: Artor Legacy
loreText: The great wolf Artor ran with Heorot in times long forgotten.

name: Decayed Skull
loreText: A monument to the world's decay carved in bone and steel.

name: IsadoraRevenge
loreText: "...and enraged she arose with murder in her eyes..."

name: Boneclamor Barbute
loreText: "The essence of the bone seemed to reverberate within my skull. Singing and dancing into a song of fortifying vigor. Never have I felt so alive." - Ethenus, First Legate of the Immortal Legion.

name: The Kestrel
loreText: May the dying breaths of your enemies put air beneath your wings.

name: Doublet of Onos Tull
loreText: The horns of the Immortal Empire fill the hearts of the living with fear, and the bones of the dead with glory.

name: Prism Wraps
loreText: The elements shift like light through a prism. If you control the prism you control the elements.

name: Urzils Pride
loreText: Strength of mind and strength of body are a potent combination.

name: Exsanguinous
loreText: Crazed is the mind of a blood starved Lich.

name: Preparation
loreText: Yrun was wise in battle, but not in his betrayal of Heorot.

name: Titan Heart
loreText: Heart of stone, blood of gravel.

name: Valeroot
loreText: The roots of Eterra grow through stone and flesh and time.

name: Vipertail
loreText: The bite of the viper brings lethargy and death.

name: IsadoraTombbinding
loreText: "...with a stake they slew her, and with silver they bound her..."

name: Ward Trail
loreText: Many things are fickle, few more so than life itself.

name: Chains of Uleros
loreText: Tether yourself to this mortal realm.

name: Mourningfrost
loreText: Spread ice with every step, like frost before sunrise.

name: Stormtide
loreText: Rest was a sin among the messenger priests of Lagon, and these boots would punish the wearer accordingly.

name: Eterras Path
loreText: Life grows in your footsteps.

name: Riverbend Grasp
loreText: Move with the fluidity of water, relax and you can react without resistance.

name: Fighting Chance
loreText: Fight for your life.

name: Boulderfists
loreText: Strike with the force of a mountain.

name: IsadoraGravechill
loreText: "...yet her strength was not blood, but of bone..."

name: Wing Guards
loreText: Speed is its own accuracy.

name: Beast King
loreText: The King of Beasts leads the charge.

name: Taste of Blood
loreText: A bloody fervor clouds the mind.

name: Tempest Maw
loreText: A last sign of favour bestowed to those doomed to fight for Lagon's amusement in his sunken arena.

name: Frozen Ire
loreText: An alliance of wengari and nomads gathered in the northern tundra, forging weapons of ice and preparing to reclaim Heoborea from the Immortal Empire.

name: Culnivars Claim
loreText: Culnivar, last scion of Liath, was a symbol of hope for the living slaves of Thetima.

name: Humming Bee
loreText: Bzzzzzzzzzz

name: Eye of Reen
loreText: Dance through the flames.

name: Cinder Song
loreText: An ode to fires past.

name: Alchemists Ladle
loreText: Infused with countless potions, its effects are unpredictable.

name: Reach of the Grave
loreText: The touch of death reaches far beyond the grave.

name: Bone Harvester
loreText: Some kill without a purpose. Acolytes kill for the harvest.

name: Hammer Of Lorent
loreText: Lorent may be gone, but its memory will remain with you as you grow.

name: Torch Of The Pontifex
loreText: Pontifex Yulia, High Priest of the Immortal Empire, would sacrifice entire villages and raise burning soldiers from the ashes.

name: Stormbreaker
loreText: Strike with the power of the storm.

name: Draalsting
loreText: Poison the mind, kill the heart.

name: Morditas Reach
loreText: Boundless ambition enshrined in ice.

name: The Last Laugh
loreText: When the headsman's blade falls, Sarno laughs in triumph.

name: Volcanus
loreText: Crafted in the Divine Era in the great forges beneath the mountains of Rahyeh.

name: Dreamthorn
loreText: Eater of dreams, weaver of nightmares.

name: The Monolith
loreText: Some slabs mark the dead, this one marks the living.

name: Close Call
loreText: Light on your feet, with a foot in the grave.

name: Soul Bastion
loreText: The weight of souls is too much for most.

name: Rahyehs Light
loreText: Burn with the fire of the eternal sun.

name: Strong Mind
loreText: Stand Fast.

name: Bleeding Heart
loreText: Drink the blood of the weak.

name: Chimaeras Essence
loreText: Shifting, Changing, Striking.

name: ElementalistFrozenHeart
loreText: ...alone with ice in his heart, he gained mastery of his art...

name: The Claw
loreText: A wolf never hunts alone.

name: Death Rattle
loreText: The rattle of the dying is the sound of weakness leaving the world.

name: The Fang
loreText: A wolf never hunts alone.

name: Orians Eye
loreText: The future burns within the prophetic lense.

name: Ring of the Third Eye
loreText: Forsee the strikes, imbue them with power.

name: ElementalistScorchingGrasp
loreText: ...his master fell, a firey death knell...

name: ElementalistStaticTouch
loreText: ...electrified with ambition, he cast spells beyond his cognition...

name: Arboreal Circuit
loreText: You can search round and round, but you are seeking an illusion.

name: Hollow Finger
loreText: Only brittle skin remains.

name: Tome of Elements
loreText: The power of the elements is greatest in their most primal state.

name: Grimoire of Necrotic Elixirs
loreText: Take a quaff from draught of undeath.

name: Soulfire
loreText: The souls of the damned burn with eternal fire.

name: Valdyr Chalice
loreText: The blood within is said to reflect the drinker's true face.

name: Orchirians Petals
loreText: Petals harvested from the remains of Orchirian the Rampant, still bright with the light of an ancient sun.

name: Plague Bearer Staff
loreText: The Plague Bearer wandered far and wide searching for a cure for his affliction and left only death in his wake.

name: Ignivar Head
loreText: Dying cinders illuminate the empty skull.

name: The Scavenger
loreText: Gods may fall and empires crumble, but the furtive scavenger lives on.

name: Liath Signet
loreText: For centuries Architect Liath ensured the prosperity of Lagon's realm.

name: Bloodgeon
loreText: Crush. Maul. Bludgeon.

name: Ucenui Sphere
loreText: Ucenui the navigator used his water magic to explore the vast ocean beyond the Isle of Storms. His fate is unknown, but his instrument remains.

name: Arek Bones
loreText: The necromancers were careful to keep Arek's mind intact while they extracted the bones from his flesh.

name: Maehlin Hubris
loreText: Maehlin devoted his life to Rahyeh. Seeking to learn his will he reached into the god's mind. Rahyeh reached back into his and set his blood aflame.

name: Heirloom of the Last Nomad
loreText: The last nomad wandered the northern wastes in the dying days of the Ruined Era, searching in vain for a living soul among the void and snow.

name: Blade of the Forgotten Knight
loreText: Incongruous shards of iron from distant eras woven together through time.

name: Defiance of the Forgotten Knight
loreText: Dread not the passage of time nor the eternal void beyond.

name: Locket of the Forgotten Knight
loreText: A sanctuary for memories lost.

name: Fiery Dragon Shoes
loreText: Embers of a dragon's heart still linger in these smoldering scales. Dire hits threaten to stoke a wrath that has long slumbered.

name: Jungle Queen Chaps of Holding
loreText: The lack of a bottom means that there is more material for pockets.

name: Kermodes Cage
loreText: The fury of the spirit bear can not be restrained or subdued, even while confined.

name: The Last Bears Fury
loreText: The last bear stood alone against the void, guarding the cave in which she thought her cubs still rested.

name: The Last Bears Scorn
loreText: The last bear's bloodline survived wars between gods, and empires.

name: The Last Bears Lament
loreText: The last bear's ancestors watched as the Temple of Eterra fell from the sky.

name: Halvars Pledge
loreText: The shaman Halvar bound himself with the spirit of the mountain.

name: Halvars Stand
loreText: When Morditas’ army closed in on him, Halvar asked the mountain to bury them together.

name: Last Gift of the Mountain
loreText: The mountain was sad to lose a friend as true as Halvar.

name: Pebbles Femur
loreText: Feeding Pebbles was one of my favorite things to do. -Traveling Merchant

name: Pebbles Collar
loreText: The bones in Pebbles' body respond to metal like a magnet. I’m beginning to think I’m in over my head. -Traveling Merchant

name: Pebbles Bitemarked Sash
loreText: As I lay in the ditch pulling my entrails back into my body, I wonder; who is the pet now?  -Traveling Merchant

name: Legacy of the Quiet Forest
loreText: “This branch will protect you, even when I can not.” - the last words Quiet heard from her forest friend.

name: Suloron Step
loreText: The rebel Suloron struck deep into Majasa's territory, but his fervour could not save him from the matrons' blades.

name: The Ashen Crown
loreText: The great crown of the regent of Wyvernfall, bestowed by Rahyeh, recovered from the ruins.

name: Shroud of Obscurity
loreText: Shrouded in a fetid swamp, disregarded by the gods' watchful eyes, the witches of Urix honed the art of blood magic.

name: Muramas Hilt
loreText: Xenath broke his father's sword, casting away the cursed blade in resentment of his harsh master, and keeping the hilt as a reminder of his loving parent.

name: Melvern Writ
loreText: "If Liath will not afford me guards I will purchase my own. Deliver this writ to Skalnir, along with the gold, and bring me back enough mercenaries to secure caravans to Vul'Kaur." - Trade Prince Melvern

name: Shard of the Shattered Lance
loreText: Dreams of deicide reflected in ice.

name: Fragments of the Shattered Lance
loreText: Crafted in desperation, seized with ambition.

name: Woven Flesh
loreText: The pinnacle of necromancy is to weave undead flesh into any form you desire.

name: Strands of Souls
loreText: It is unseemly to wear the heads of your foes upon your belt like a common witch or wengari, and what is the point if the eyes can no longer see and the brains can no longer think. No, a necromancer should wear the souls of those they have conquered, a repository of sentient energy ready to consume.

name: Ribbons of Blood
loreText: The congealing liquid grips tight around your finger, the memories of its vessels passing into those that you summon.

name: Frozen Eyes of Formosus
loreText: The eyes still stare out, transfixed with longing for the power their owner sought.

name: Last Steps of the Living
loreText: Step out of the cold, out of the mortal realm, and take your place among the empire.

name: Atrophy
loreText: Rust and corrosion stand as monuments to the inevitability of time.

name: Dark Shroud of Cinders
loreText: The dying embers of a god swiling around a blackened cloak.

name: The Confluence of Fate
loreText: The fall of Eterra is inevitable, as it always has been.

name: Bulwark of the Last Abyss
loreText: Hold steadfast at the edge of light.

name: Trident of the Last Abyss
loreText: The dark ocean of void lies still. Echoes are all that remain of the strife that preceeded it.

name: Coral Aegis
loreText: As storms scour the land, the sea swells and flourishes.

name: Alluvion
loreText: Waves woven into steel.

name: Symbol of Demise
loreText: The fate of the world engraved in bone.

name: Dragonflame Edict
loreText: Go forth and conquer by force or by fire.

name: Oceareon
loreText: Empires rise and fall like the waves, but the ocean's might is eternal.

name: Mortality Grasp
loreText: "The living necromancers of the early empire were quick to take life and to return it. They knew more of the nature of life than any who had come before them, so it is curious that they clung to their own with such desperation. Were these founders of our empire fools and cowards, or did they know something then that we have now forgotten? I wonder if there is something that we have lost in these centuries of undeath." - Recanted texts of Historian Zabat

name: Boardman Plank
loreText: Unleash the Beast.

name: Gambler Fallacy
loreText: Just means you're due for a big one, don't worry.

name: Avarice
loreText: Have the wisdom to know what is rightfully yours and the will to seize it.

name: Transient Rest
loreText: We follow in the footsteps of our ancestors, but our paths no longer end.

name: Xithara Conundrum
loreText: Strong in times of peace, brilliant in the day, generous in times of plenty, and absent when they fade.

name: Liraka Claws
loreText: Scalebane recruits are taught to never travel south of Mes'Ork in groups of less than six. Information on Li'raka's whereabouts are valuable, so it is pertinent that one should escape alive.

name: Quicksilver Coil
loreText: War is about the destination, not the journey.

name: Smoke Weaver
loreText: A true assassin must create their own shadows to strike from.

name: Uethrin Stand
loreText: Uethrin made his last stand on the shores of Lake Mawn. By dawn all that remained was a pile of Wengari bodies and his line of ballistae standing still and victorious upon the shore. His home was safe for another winter.

name: Zerrick Guile
loreText: Zerrick's humility and reverence for the Nagasa and the Scalebane leaders long kept him in their favour, sealing their demise.

name: Zerrick Ambition
loreText: In games of power you win or you die

name: Hell Reach
loreText: As Wyvernfall burned nothing could escape the flames.

name: Drelkor Compass
loreText: "Enemies lie to the north, south, east, and west, but it matters not whence they come; Welryn must not fall." Drelkor, last Lord of the Lakes.

name: Gladiator Oath
loreText: There is no mercy among the sands of the arena. Majasa demands beauty, be it the glory of victory or the dance of blood.

name: Acidfletch
loreText: From the Radiant Dunes to the Sea of Glass, order corrodes throughout Eterra.

name: Life Journey
loreText: Hold fast to the wheel of life, cling tight as it withers your skin and grinds your flesh to dust.

name: Troaka Teeth
loreText: Many among the nomads had assumed Troaka slain along with her family, but in truth she still hunted out on the tundra and among the frozen lakes. Except she no longer hunted deer nor eber, only wengari.

name: Raindance
loreText: Those who seek Lagon's favour dance beneath the moon. Those who seek his adoration dance beneath the waves.

name: Arrowguard
loreText: "Look only west and trust that the sun itself leads our march. " - Pontixex Aurelus to the auxiliaries of Solarum

name: Omnividence
loreText: Gaze upon all that will never be.

name: Sunwreath
loreText: Yield not snow, nor seas, nor sand to the flames of the sun, for it will consume all and remain unsated.

name: Eulogy of Blood
loreText: Only the whispers of ghosts can be heard among the stillness of the crimson tundra.

name: Anchor of Oblivion
loreText: Hope pulls you forward, but the anchor ever stays your feet, as is the fate of mortals.

name: Wings of Argentus
loreText: Falter not before the fire nor the ice, but let your ambition be your wings and soar above them both.

name: Eye of Storms
loreText: Torrential rain falls upon a dark and churning sea to the deafening sound of thunder and waves. The moon gleams from above and Lagon gazes from below as the centuries pass.

name: Horns of Uhkeiros
loreText: Uhkeriros, Emperor of Corpses, hear our prayers! Devour your chosen and free us from this undeath.

name: Gaspar Will
loreText: I failed to protect. I failed to lead. Destruction is all that is left.

name: Gaspar Acuity
loreText: Knowledge without power is nothing but informed futility.

name: Gaspar Insight
loreText: Among the ruins what is wisdom, but empty platitudes?

name: Reign of Winter
loreText: “For us to survive, others must suffer. One day you will accept this truth.” -Morditas, forsaken son of Heorot.

name: Call of the Tundra
loreText: Jormun slew the great wyverns of Farwood at Heorot's behest, freezing them with his shouts and shattering them with his blades.

name: Faith of the Frozen
loreText: Found among the frozen corpses in the wake of Morditas' wrath. Runes etched into the handle read "Heorot protect us".

name: Bhuldar Wrath
loreText: Shatter! Erupt! This world is only a prison for the immortal flame.

name: Herkir Vessel
loreText: Drink deep of the flame, brothers... Immortality awaits.

name: Logi Hunger
loreText: Rise! Through fire we are reborn.

name: Moenia Mentis
loreText: "To survive the void we must build unassailable walls, not just around this town, but around our minds. Do not approach the cultists, do not speak to them." - Eos Falrein, last Archmage of Vul'Kaur.

name: Raven Rise
loreText: As men and gods fight the ravens rise. As the blood settles the ravens alight.

name: Flight of the First
loreText: Those who ventured outside in the Ancient Era lived in constant terror

name: Aergon Refuge
loreText: "Hold fast, maintain the runes! The flames of Rahyeh may envelope this tower, but they shall not penetrate these walls. There is knowledge here that must not burn."

name: Unique Skeleton Mace
loreText: As the last dagger plunged into Sinathia's body he uttered a dying curse, sealing the fate of his assassins.

name: Unique Skeleton Shield
loreText: As the last of his assassins succumbed to their fates, Sinathia stirred within his tomb.

name: Herald of the Scurry
loreText:
One squirrel, two squirrel, cute and furry
Three squirrel, four squirrel, what's the hurry?
Five squirrel, six squirrel, you should worry
Run and hide, here comes the scurry!

name: Omnis
loreText: All the stars in the empty sky flicker at once and fade into silence and shadow.

name: Siphon of Anguish
loreText: The sorrow of those that remain feeds the hungering void.

name: Stymied Fate
loreText: The end comes slowly, then quickly, then it is all that has ever been.

name: Apathy Maw
loreText: Forsake the darkening sky and let the ground swallow your mind.

name: Shattered Chains
loreText: As he was interred chains fell from the sky. As he was exhumed chains fell from the dead.

name: Marina Lost Soul
loreText: Countess Marina revived the cursed land of Urix in the name of the Emperor, unaware that some spirits are better left in the shadows.

name: Eye of Orexia
loreText: From beneath the dormant volcano, the titan's eye flickers and turns staring into rock and magma.

name: Leviathan Carver
loreText: Forge Master Rupin'Ur sought to create a weapon capable of slaying any beast, but to most it more resembled a hunk of raw steel.

name: Lethal Concentration
loreText: "Jade Dust- derived from fossils sold by traders claiming to come from beyond the eastern horizon. Evaluation- Extremely deadly." - Scalebane Master of Poison's Notes

name: Vilatria Storm Crown
loreText: Studying at the great colleges of Welryn and Vul'Kaur, Vilatria perfected the art of Storm Magic. Yet a scholarly life never sated her ambition and she returned to the Lake kingdoms of central Eterra. Without a god to lead them, their lords and elders were proud and open to challenges of force. With the college of Welryn on their doorsteps, they were not unprepared for arcane challengers, but their wards could not protect them from the lightning that tore threw the roofs of their halls and smote them in their thrones, and so Vilatria claimed their kingdoms by force.

name: Vilatria Downfall
loreText: In her old age, Vilatria's hubris only grew. Having defeated all her human challengers, the storm queen's mind turned to Lagon, the fabled god of the sea and storms. With her apprentice, she sailed out from the border town of Etendell, along the estuary and out into the Fogrise sea. Lagon was said to dwell beneath the far seas beyond the western isles, yet the journey was quick for Vilatria as she fuelled her sails with winds of magic. Eventually she alighted at night upon a great isle of rock, coral, and ancient shrines. The moon spoke to her from its reflection flickering on the surface of the sea. It spoke with the voice of Lagon, and it spoke with amusement at her challenge, readily accepting, and opening the heavens. Thousands of years have passed and Vilatria is long dead, and her kingdom fractured, but the storms still rage upon the seas around that isle.

name: Salt the Wound
loreText: A critical success, a critical failure... It's all in the coin toss.

name: Azurral Fury
loreText: The nagasa of the Scorched Basin always warned merchants to disregard the false oasis on the long road to Keltha, but Azurral had never put much heed in the snake people's superstition and his thirst overcame him. He drew deep from the blood red waters. The next day he awoke to his caravan reduced to ash upon the sand and his sword burning hot in his hand.

name: Sanguine Hoard
loreText: "Our enemies have been hoarding their blood for far too long. Loose the arrows and let it return to Eterra."

name: Jasper Searing Pride
loreText: A Warrior's Life burned to ashes and all that's left is pride.

name: Devotion
loreText: Where your limits end, your faith's test begins.

name: Fulgurite Shard
loreText: The best weapon smiths of the western isles disregard common metal. They need only the glass left in the wake of Lagon's fury.

name: Corsair Boarding Shield
loreText: Striking the Dreadnought would be their greatest feat yet, a win to remember that would silence those wishing to surrender to the Empire. However, for the captain freeing the whales was the true reward.

name: Corsair Blood Cowl
loreText: Standing up to the Empire, not giving in to temptation, the Corsairs of the Scoured Reefs are among the last standing men and women with running blood in their veins.

name: Scales of Eterra Fire Cold
loreText: The Scales of Eterra weighed the balance of the elements, ensuring that one would not eclipse the other. Balance is control, and whether that control breeds peace or destruction is up to those who hold the scales.

name: Scales of Eterra Cold Lightning
loreText: The Scales of Eterra weighed the balance of the elements, ensuring that one would not eclipse the other. Balance is control, and whether that control breeds peace or destruction is up to those who hold the scales.

name: Scales of Eterra Fire Lightning
loreText: The Scales of Eterra weighed the balance of the elements, ensuring that one would not eclipse the other. Balance is control, and whether that control breeds peace or destruction is up to those who hold the scales.

name: Bastion of Honour
loreText: Heed not the cowards that fight from the safety of range, or the generals that sit in their camps while their soldiers' blood spills. Face your foes with honour, a shield, and a good blade.

name: Rule of the Simoon
loreText: When fire falls in love with the wind, run.

name: Tongue of the Aberrant Seer
loreText: Litugy in darkness leads only to despair, poison on the tongue beguiles the soul, truth in unwords reveals salvation.

name: Battlemage Endeavour
loreText: In times of strife the inflexible are doomed to break. A true Battlemage must master all the arts of war.

name: Stormhide Paws
loreText: The roar of thunder above the frozen seas has long inspired stories among the nomads of great white bears that prowl the ice beneath the storms.

name: Darkstride
loreText: Decades after the rest of civilisation hid itself beneath the ground, the last of the void knights still roamed the ruined surface, searching relentlessly for a way to turn the power of the void against itself. Their discoveries remain with them, lost amidst the shadows.

name: Thorn Slinger
loreText: After making peace with the nagasa, Lord Berant of Skalnir was impatient to secure his legacy and so turned his eyes to an easier conquest. The Verdant Isle was small and his scouts assured him that its druid inhabitants had no weapons. But when his soldiers returned from the sacred island, they brought back only their thorn pierced fallen and tales of vine strangled ships.

name: Curse of Perseverance
loreText: The last imperial dwelt for centuries beneath Welryn, bound by his own sanctuary to witness the ruin of this world.

name: Lessons of the Metropolis
loreText: "Stay quick on your feet. Don't get hit once, but if you do get hit once, don't get hit twice" - Dar'Fuun, Scalebane Recruiter.

name: Kelthan Blasting Agent
loreText: Overseer Nicovus had little patience for the traditional mining techniques of his living predecessors. The empire would delve deep and it would delve fast.

name: Ravenous Void
loreText: A pair of mimic brothers, lost in the ravenous void, hungry for anyone who dips their hands inside.

name: Aberrant Call
loreText: A beacon among the eternity of the damned. A call to return to the world of the living, if only for a moment.

name: Flayers Pride
loreText: The obscene angles at which the patches of undead skin are arranged belies the unsettling precision required to produce such a steady stream of blood. A treasured implement for any Hemomancer.

name: Throne of Ambition
loreText: Argentus may have been born a mere slave of Rahyeh, but his ambition eclipsed even his god.

name: Eternal Eclipse
loreText: The triumph of man and osprix culminates upon the altar of Solarum. A frail sun rises behind an illuminable shadow, spreading a corona of half light upon the ruined world beneath. This feeble shadow is no salvation from the end, but only from the hope of what might have been.

name: Frostbite Shackles
loreText: All the advances and discoveries of this great empire, yet even in death we remain frozen in place, shackled to this mortal plane.

name: Stormcarved Testament
loreText: In ancient times it was believed that the will of Lagon could be gleaned from the patterns burned into the stones of the Scoured Reefs, and studied them at great length. Yet a wild storm needs no reason to strike where it does and the inscrutable stones were dismissed by later storm priests, who claimed it did not befit surface dwellers to decipher their god's purposes or designs.

name: Nightbringer
loreText: Most flee from the encroaching void and cower beneath the soil, but those with greater aspirations do not run from power, however terrifying it might be. Hunt the rifts and you will find what you seek.

name: Twisted Heart of Uhkeiros
loreText: In the blackened heart of an emperor, greed devours mercy.

name: Yulia Path
loreText: Between loyalty and opression, hope and tyranny, the path of wisdom must be found.

name: Trinity of Flames
loreText: Three souls to nourish an unquenchable flame.

name: Deaths Embrace
loreText: Everything comes with a price - even death.

name: Paranoia
loreText: In the whispering bull rushes and the swaying leaves, in the howling wind and flickering shadows, everywhere enemies hide.

name: Prismatic Gaze
loreText:
Time collapsing void
Observation... destruction
Bring her light with you

name: Chronostasis
loreText: It's the missing beat, the spurious tick of a broken clock, the jolt of sudden realization. As we swing this timeless artifact like frenzied apes, minds future and past laugh at our ignorance.

name: The Judicator
loreText: It is Rahyeh's duty to pass judgement, and a Paladin's to deliver it.

name: Aurelis
loreText: The sky's wrath alights in a golden storm.

name: Turanis Bident
loreText: Matron Tu'rani is still revered amongst the nagasa for leading the first successful campaign against the Osprix. Striking them out of the sky with javelins and thunderbolts, she drove them back into the Mountains of the Sun, liberating the town of Kel'tha.

name: Ferebors Chisel
loreText: When Ferebor's collection of totems grew too large, he gathered his creations in a cave while his fellow nomads moved on without him. As the winters passed and his collection grew, other nomads would visit him to trade food and furs for totems crafted to defend their tribes.

name: Ferebors Persistence
loreText: Fifty winters since they first parted, Ferebor's tribe returned to his cave eager to purchase another totem. However, instead of finding the storied totem carver, they were driven away by his creations. Assuming him dead, they paid their respects and moved on, yet the number of totems around the cave continued to grow. Some say Ferebor still dwells there, cut off from the outside but carving totem after totem among the shadows.

name: Roots of Vithrasil
loreText: Root yourself into the cold earth and drink deep from Eterra's bounty.

name: Usurpers Mandate
loreText: "Only one with the blood and bones of a king may rule. Fortunately, I have both" - Venred the Usurper

name: Snowdrift
loreText: Let the northwind mold you, cold and howling above the frozen tundra.

name: Silvafrond
loreText: The life of the forest flows through every root and leaf

name: Droughts Release
loreText: "Our tribulations shall end with prosperity, and theirs with death" - Grand Alchemist Avello

name: Thornshell
loreText: Driven from their homes, the Meruna of Sur Soreth settled among the swamps and fens around Urix. Despite their unfamiliarity with the shallows and thickets of their new home, they gradually adapted to it, learning to tunnel through the mud and grow thorns from their shells.

name: Julras Stardial
loreText: "By the movement of the stars, thirteen centuries have passed, are ruins all that remains?"

name: Somnia
loreText: The very atmosphere is different here, what once slumbered is now awoken and free.

name: Julras Obsession
loreText: "This future must not come to pass. Surely there is some way, some power that can avert this horror?"

name: Vessel of Strife
loreText: The durance of strife is an impossible task. Boiling within, despair's sole fate is to erupt and envelop its vessel.

name: Shadow String
loreText: Unseen hands strike hardest

name: Harthenons Vow
loreText: "My first loyalty is to those who follow me. I will not abandon them" - Harthenon, Last Druid of the Verdant Isle.

name: Singularity
loreText: "And thus from a singular point of infinite detail did the goddess Eterra weave the fabric of reality" - Book of Elders, Chapter 1.

name: Chronicle of the Damned
loreText: The souls of those whose deaths are inked within these pages are bound to the book itself, forever cursed to serve the reader.

name: Diothaens Bloody Nib
loreText: "Some say the pen is mightier than the sword. Sacrificing your blood to write the words, now there’s real power." - Archmage Diothaen

name: Torkrefins Hunger
loreText: The nomads around lake Mawn were optimistic as Grand Matriarch Torkrefin rose to power among the nearby Wengari. She had at first seemed more civilised than the average Wengari, carrying a giant sword instead of a crude axe or club. Nevertheless she proved particularly difficult to reason with on account of her propensity to devour their envoys.

name: Face of the Mountain
loreText: The face of the mountain yields no emotion as waves, weather, and time crash upon it.

name: Peak of the Mountain
loreText: To achieve the loftiest of goals, victory must be valued over survival.

name: Immolators Oblation
loreText: The pyromancers following the Fire Lich, Cremorus, perfected the technique of burning their own souls to fuel their dark magic.

name: Penumbra
loreText: Honour has no place in the arena. To defeat the mightiest foes, a champion must dance on the edge of shadows, preparing for the perfect moment to strike.

name: Soul Gamblers Fallacy
loreText: When coins run out, you still have your soul to gamble.

name: Burning Avarice
loreText: Have the ambition to know what might be yours, and the conviction to burn those who would keep it from you.

name: Scales of Lemniscate
loreText: A weapon wielded in service of the cycle. Surrender both hope and despair to serve eternity.

name: Hive Mind
loreText:
"Why is that decoy buzzing?"
"That's not a decoy, it's a beecoy!"

name: Gathering Fury
loreText: Lightning does strike twice

name: Golem Cage
loreText: "Guilty as charged, I was being daft, but raising bones is my craft." - C.N.B

name: Lament of the Lost Refuge
loreText: "I can hear them skitter, scratching at the walls. Their cries echo through these caverns like the wails of those lost outside. Just rats for now, but ‘they’ are lost no longer, they come back to us now, but different - corrupted."

name: Branch of Hallows
loreText: Most druids talk to their woodland kin, rarely do the trees consider their fleshy brethren. Some branches seek a host to commune with, be it a man, beast, or treekin. Madness touches all in different ways.

name: Unstable Core
loreText: Whether wrapped in shadows, barriers, blessings, or armor, the storm reduced them to ash.

name: Liaths Machinations
loreText: With careful planning and precise instruments, one can bring order even to a flame.

name: Red Ring of Atlaria
loreText: One of seven enchanted rings that were all believed to be lost when Atlaria vanished beneath the waves.

name: Shadow Beacon
loreText: Once light fades, only darkness can guide those who remain.

name: Telfuns Mirage
loreText: Fascinated by mirages, Telf'un long wandered the deserts, telescope in hand. Even after decades of study and delirium he failed to truly comprehend their nature, but eventually the mirages took pity on the old man and turned him into one of their own.

name: Firestarters Torch
loreText: "By Rahyeh's will this town shall burn!"

name: Rotmind
loreText: The witches of the Red Marsh learned to cultivate a type of magical fungus within their own skulls. The mycelium grew eagerly into their brains, twisting their minds, but the powers it bestowed were well worth their sanity.

name: The Ghost Maker
loreText: A precise and expertly crafted tool for cutting a soul from a body

name: Jelkhors Blast Knife
loreText: Jelkhor was once the greatest archer and artificer in all of Majasa's domain. Eventually the diamond matrons grew fearful of his popularity among the human populace, and so they accused him of a terrible crime and had his left hand severed, so that he could no longer wield a bow. Though disgraced and outcast, Jelkhor's resolve remained and his ingenuity gave him the tools he needed to deliver his revenge.

name: Fragment of the Enigma
loreText: When the scholars of Vul'Kaur realised the artifact's power, they shattered it immediately and told not even Majasa of their discovery.

name: Hand of Judgement
loreText: The light of divinity!

name: Harbinger of Stars
loreText: Above the skies the natural and the arcane are one.

name: Bos Anarchy
loreText: The streets of Maj'elka engender no love for authority

name: Apostates Sanctuary
loreText: "The gods serve only themselves, foolish mortals. They will not protect you. If you wish to survive, you must forge your own sanctuary."

name: Pillagers Gold
loreText: The mercenary guilds of Skalnir care naught for the destruction they leave in their wake, as long as their pay is fair and they can take a cut of the spoils.

name: Apogee of Frozen Light
loreText: Formosus knew not what cause these warriors had fought for, or what ancient conflict left their bodies frozen upon the outer ice. But, as he felt the rage and power of their lingering souls he knew well what purpose they would now fulfill.

name: Swaddling of the Erased
loreText: "Cities, memories, whole timelines have been erased by the spreading void. There is much work ahead of us." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Font of the Erased
loreText: "For those who have lost everything, The Weaver's bounty knows no end."  - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Cradle of the Erased
loreText: "Rest now, you are safe here in this cocoon. It's all gone now, but this is not where your thread ends." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Advent of the Erased
loreText: "Those long lost may walk again on woven feet" - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Dedication of an Erased Primalist
loreText: "A protector of wilds long lost shall now serve a greater purpose" - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Knowledge of an Erased Mage
loreText: "Such insight wasted on a lost timeline. It is for naught now, but it proves thy worth." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Code of an Erased Sentinel
loreText: "Memories of past honour that befits the woven form" - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Ambitions of an Erased Acolyte
loreText: "The context of thy aspirations is long lost, yet they still pervade thy silken form." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Gambit of an Erased Rogue
loreText: "It is no accident that you have outlasted your world, but belief in one's own luck is a powerful tool." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Howl of the West Wind
loreText: Dark clouds roll in from the Sea of the Storms

name: Cycle of Putrescence
loreText: "The cycle of life and death is forever shattered. Our cities shall not crumble and our citizens shall not yield or die at the whims of a winged devil. We shall persist. Our bodies may whither and decay, but even when we fall we return and persist again. Glory to the new cycle. Glory to persistence and decay. Glory to humanity." - Thelocus, Imperial Governor of Argentum

name: Static Shell
loreText: The carapace of a meruna storm ogre makes for an impressive trophy, and an effective cuirass.

name: Reowyns Fortress
loreText: "I have long travelled the north, Aergon. I have seen the great stone ruins at Reimhaven and Kolheim and I have seen the frozen blood of their ancient defenders. No tower can stand forever and those walls shall not avail you when the flames descends. You must strike first." - Reowyn's last letter to the mages of Oerden's Watch.

name: Blood of the Exile
loreText: Fleeing does not stem the flow

name: Crest of Unity
loreText: In the waning years of his reign Lord Drelkor forbade the mages of Welryn from focusing their studies on any single element, lest their research lead them to aligning with forces beyond his domain.

name: Abacus Rod
loreText: "Runes provide order to magic, a way to shape it, harness it, and use it for one's will. Follow their structure and you shall remain in control, break it and you shall loose the madness between the lines." - Arch Runemaster Unvar to the college of Kolheim.

name: Elecoes Abandon
loreText: "I do not need to mend the wounds that a dead foe had not the chance to inflict" - Elecoe the Alchemist Thief

name: Transcribers Graver
loreText: Carve the burning nightmares into stone

name: Box of Hydrae
loreText: Deep within her research of Geometromancy, Runemaster Heraclea was surprised to discover a shape that behaved as if it had many heads.

name: Fundamental Criterion
loreText: Discard freely the paths not taken. They are only distractions from deeper knowledge.

name: Freys Retreat
loreText: "The city is lost. All remaining garrisons are to head north. The great roots and ancient wards of Farwood shall be our last stronghold against the horde. And, Heorot Willing, it will be their tomb." - Arch Cryomancer Frey, Champion of Heorot.

name: Merophage
loreText: Forged by Archmage Drinial for his remaining son, it carries a powerful enchantment to draw out yearning. Now, its wielders unburdened, the sword itself yearns for its shattered kin.

name: Mad Alchemists Ladle
loreText: Infused with countless potions, its effects are very unpredictable.

name: The Cuckoo
loreText: A puppet crafted to hold a transient spirit. It seems merely avian in nature, but it's impossible to shake the sense of unease that builds as one looks into those carved black eyes.

name: Wheel of Torment
loreText: The torment of consumed souls lingers within their devourer.

name: Communion of the Erased
loreText: "Hark, disparate souls, for you have been blessed. Together you shall imbibe the venom of new life." - The Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Stygian Coal
loreText: The congealed loathing of souls trapped beneath the earth. Ample fuel for the destruction to come.

name: Sigeons Reprisal
loreText: "The best protection is the enemy's fear of retaliation" - General Sigeon

name: Spine of Malatros
loreText: The withered dragon Malatros taught his followers the art of chthonic fire and sorcery. The rage of dragons would not die with him.

name: Blood Roost
loreText: The smell of blood fills the air.

name: Naals Tooth
loreText: Among the island nomads there was once a legend of a great beastmaster, Gatan Larn, who was so in tune with the paravian kind that he could commune with crows and raptors.

name: Sword Catcher
loreText: "The wild cannot be protected by unnatural things, by stone walls or iron shields. The flame and steel that would destroy it must be stopped in their tracks and broken by the primal rage of its defenders." - Nomad Chief Thulr

name: Black Blade of Chaos
loreText: Forged with shadow iron on an unlit moon to claim Lagon's power over elemental chaos.

name: Orians Sun Seal
loreText: "Piety need not stay your wings nor slow the winds of conquest." - Grand Haruspex Uranos

name: Egg of the Forgotten
loreText: The lost scion of light dwells no longer among the sun, nor in the resplendent mountains of the east. It lingers only in the minds of the servants of fire, guiding the hands that carve and chisel.

name: Harbingers Needle
loreText: A needle forged by Aberroth in the heart of a black hole. It is designed to be plunged into a powerful foe, to sacrifice them to the dark god of fate.

name: Bane of Winter
loreText: Time thaws all winters

name: The Inevitable
loreText: All timelines fade and the Harbingers flock like crows to the remains.

name: Phantom Grip
loreText: The one armed smith, Draelyn, perfected the art of controlling her animated weapons as if she were holding them with her own hand. Though lauded throughout the forges of Solarum, she was secretive about her methods, and this lead to rumours that she invoked necromancy in her craft, and some even swore they had glimpsed spectral fingers gripping her weapons as she fought.

name: Yruns Penance
loreText: Like Yrun himself, the former champion's blade was imprisoned in bark and ice.

name: Flight of Quetzeri
loreText: As the exiled druids flourished in the cloud forests, they learned to seemlessly flit between the forms of human and quetzal.

name: Plague Dragons Tongue
loreText: In the early days of Welryn, the archmage Sinveri led the assault to slay the plague dragon, Quolahron, last scion of Uhkeiros, and save the town's fields from blight. The dragon fell, yet, like many mages of Welryn, Sinveri did not lack ambition, and took Quolahron's crystal tongue, to research and wield its dark power.

name: Nihilis
loreText: From every void, every lost moment, the will of Orobyss echoes for eternity.

name: Wall of Nothing
loreText: Cloaked in the void, Harbingers need fear naught.

name: Aberroths Command
loreText: "Be the instrument of ruin, that which delivers time's atrophy, and fate's damnation."

name: Seed of Ekkidrasil
loreText: From the minds of the devoted grows the roots of the tree of nothing

name: Null Portent
loreText: Gorge on the prophecies of futures lost

name: Fingers of the Phantom Mire
loreText: A drained bog seeks vengeance

name: Monument of Protection
loreText: A shield dedicated to the great warrior, Arek, who gave his life to repel death from the city's walls.

name: Event Horizon
loreText: All must pass beyond the brink

name: World Splitter
loreText: Sever the chains that bind reality

name: Tolmats Incorrect History of Eterra
loreText: Written by an esteemed historian, this book chronicles the entire history of Eterra as we understand it. Or, at least, as Sir Tolmat understood it.

name: Mantle of the Pale Ox
loreText: Fight with the strength of an ox and the wisdom of a spirit

name: Phalanx
loreText: It was not just Liath's magic and machinery that drove the Wengari threat from Thetima's walls, but the discipline and order her generals instilled in her human soldiers.

name: Pearls of the Swine Blood
loreText: Perrin the swineherd preferred not to ask questions. He didn't ask where the feed he was paid to accept came from, or why it glowed at night. He didn't ask why his swine began to whisper the names of dead men when they thought he wasn't looking.

name: Pearls of the Swine Fire
loreText: Perrin the swineherd preferred not to ask questions. He didn't ask where the feed he was paid to accept came from, or why it glowed at night. He didn't ask why his swine began to whisper the names of dead men when they thought he wasn't looking.

name: Pearls of the Swine Poison
loreText: Perrin the swineherd preferred not to ask questions. He didn't ask where the feed he was paid to accept came from, or why it glowed at night. He didn't ask why his swine began to whisper the names of dead men when they thought he wasn't looking.

name: Gordian Prism
loreText: "What is innovation without the power to prove its worth? If you present me a solution that is outperformed by a raw expression of power then you have brought me nothing!" -Runemaster Gordian

name: Crystalwind
loreText: The wind chimes sing within the mines

name: Elecoes Innovation
loreText: Elecoe discovered that with the right ingredients potions could be imbued with the luck of the brewer.

name: Orb Weavers Fang
loreText: "You are the blade that will cut the imperfections from the Weaver's web." - Masque, the Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Nest of Nightmares
loreText: "I was surrounded by golden silk, curious creatures, and Her words filling my very soul." - Masque, the Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Essence Weaver
loreText: "Imagine a world free of pain, chaos, and sorrow. A world free of corruption. A perfect world!" - Masque, the Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Weavers Gift
loreText: "The Weaver is the greatest artist of all, to grace Her domain is a blessing." - Masque, the Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Inheritance of the Erased
loreText: "Our tears for them will be dew upon perfect golden silk." - Masque, the Acolyte of Golden Silk

name: Shattered Worlds
loreText: The unrestrained power of countless shattered timelines, condensed into a vortex of possibility

name: Downfall of the Righteous
loreText: They told me not to do it, now I know why

name: Brewmasters Buckle
loreText:
They say beer makes you bold
I say it makes you unbreakable

name: Executioners Tithe
loreText: The Immortal Empire conquered death and brought freedom to humanity. Yet in that freedom, there remained one inevitable certainty... the tax claimed from their very souls.

name: The Land Before
loreText: Before the falling of the temple and the strife of gods, there was peace between the osprix, the wengari, the meruna, and the nagasa.

name: Legends Entwined
loreText: All stories grow from the same roots

name: Harmony of the First
loreText: The first of osprix, wengari, meruna, and nagasa were united in purpose, under the guidance of the gods and Eterra above them.

name: Onslaught of Cerata
loreText: Impale upon the horns of primordial might

name: Blossom of Immortal Stone
loreText: Three petals unwithered by time

name: Carrion of Creation
loreText: "From blood all is brought forth, and to blood all shall return." - Ullur Sandhoof, first neophyte of the Coagulated Titan.

name: Horn of the Bone Wisp
loreText: Wisps once took physical form upon the shifting surface of Eterra

name: Mask of Indifference
loreText: A visage unweathered by even time itself

name: Permanence of Primal Knowledge
loreText: The vines grow with strange symbols, the meaning of which has long been lost to time.

name: Wings of Discord
loreText: Osprix elders used to tell of the Quetzal Dragons, resplendant with wings of mismatched feathers, who were never seen to roost in the same place twice. The elders speculated that having visited every peak and forest in Eterra, they traveled far over the sea in search of new lands.

name: Whetstone Gavel
loreText: All is judged according to its creation

name: Truesight Glass
loreText: Looking through the right glass can reveal the weaknesses of a foe, the gaps in its armor drawing the eye like resplendant orbs of gold.

name: Evolutions End
loreText: A fossil of a lineage forged in time

name: Spirit Xylem
loreText: The crystal wood inside carries spirits to their rightful destination

name: Bones of the Ancestral Pack
loreText: Ghosts lay the tracks of the living

name: Architects of Astral Blood
loreText: The noblest of ancient beasts wore their hearts in the sky

name: Unbroken Charge
loreText: "Deflect their blows, break their lines." - Griffonry Commander Aereus

name: Abandoned Eyes of the Weaver
loreText: The coalescing Weaver had no more need for mundane eyes

name: Abandoned Chitin of the Weaver
loreText: What was once protection became only a burdensome cage as The Weaver spun a greater form

name: Laups Path
loreText: Laup, son of Yornir, once deemed himself a coward when he fled into a bramble of thorns to escape the warriors of Morditas. Now, warriors wear wreaths of thorn and race through the thickets, that they may honor the blood Laup shed to bring warning to Heoborea.

name: Keplahans Pyrolith
loreText: Elder Keplahan found the stillness of runes lifeless and unworth of pursuit. To him, true magic thrived only in motion, in the fire between change and creation.

name: Keplahans Cryolith
loreText: Beneath the cold shimmer of the stars, Elder Keplahan burned with envy. His own travels would one day cease, yet the heavens would wander forever.

name: Oculus of Ruin
loreText: Within glass stained with darkness you see infinite paths to ruin. All alike in their despair, all alike in their inevitability.
